ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data entry */,
  "roll_imu" REAL /* Roll angle measured by IMU */,
  "pitch_imu" REAL /* Pitch angle measured by IMU */,
  "yaw_imu" REAL /* Yaw angle measured by IMU */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Angle of attack */,
  "beta" REAL /* Side slip angle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UAV that generated the flight data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission associated with the flight */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the UAV */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the UAV */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the UAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_uav_id FOREIGN KEY ("uav_id") REFERENCES uavs ("uav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command entry */,
  "throttle_des" REAL /* Desired throttle setting */,
  "roll_des" REAL /* Desired roll angle */,
  "pitch_des" REAL /* Desired pitch angle */,
  "yaw_des" REAL /* Desired yaw angle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was issued */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who issued the command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., manual, autonomous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_commands_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pid_settings" (
  "pid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for PID settings */,
  "kp_roll" REAL /* Proportional gain for roll */,
  "ki_roll" REAL /* Integral gain for roll */,
  "kd_roll" REAL /* Derivative gain for roll */,
  "kp_pitch" REAL /* Proportional gain for pitch */,
  "ki_pitch" REAL /* Integral gain for pitch */,
  "kd_pitch" REAL /* Derivative gain for pitch */,
  "kp_yaw" REAL /* Proportional gain for yaw */,
  "ki_yaw" REAL /* Integral gain for yaw */,
  "kd_yaw" REAL /* Derivative gain for yaw */,
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UAV that uses these PID settings */,
  "pid_config" TEXT /* Description of the PID configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pid_settings_uav_id FOREIGN KEY ("uav_id") REFERENCES uavs ("uav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "GyroX" REAL /* Gyroscope X-axis reading */,
  "GyroY" REAL /* Gyroscope Y-axis reading */,
  "GyroZ" REAL /* Gyroscope Z-axis reading */,
  "AccX" REAL /* Accelerometer X-axis reading */,
  "AccY" REAL /* Accelerometer Y-axis reading */,
  "AccZ" REAL /* Accelerometer Z-axis reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., IMU, GPS) */,
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UAV that generated the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_uav_id FOREIGN KEY ("uav_id") REFERENCES uavs ("uav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radio_commands" (
  "radio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radio command entry */,
  "radio_ch1" INTEGER /* Radio channel 1 command */,
  "radio_ch2" INTEGER /* Radio channel 2 command */,
  "radio_ch3" INTEGER /* Radio channel 3 command */,
  "radio_ch4" INTEGER /* Radio channel 4 command */,
  "radio_ch5" INTEGER /* Radio channel 5 command */,
  "radio_ch6" INTEGER /* Radio channel 6 command */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "transmitter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmitter that sent the radio command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radio_commands_transmitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmitter_id") REFERENCES transmitters ("transmitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fail_safe_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fail-safe event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight data associated with the fail-safe */,
  "failsafeTriggered" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the fail-safe was triggered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the fail-safe event */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fail-safe event */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or outcome of the fail-safe event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fail_safe_events_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, pilot, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uavs" (
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UAV */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the UAV */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UAV */,
  "uav_type" TEXT /* Type of UAV (e.g., fixed-wing, rotary-wing) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the UAV */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the UAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmitters" (
  "transmitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmitter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the transmitter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmitter */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the transmitter */,
  "power" REAL /* Power output of the transmitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight data associated with the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event or action logged (e.g., takeoff, landing, waypoint reached) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, command sent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
